chain.thought: The score of the match where Tommy Robredo was the runner-up on 15 April 2001 was 5–7, 2–6. Since he was the losing player, his points would be the sum of the smaller numbers in each set: 5 (from the first set) and 2 (from the second set). Therefore, Tommy Robredo scored a total of 7 points in this match.
